title: platyaechmea retusa
intro: Platyaechmea retusa, also known as the "prayer plant" or "Calathea," is a species of flowering plant in the Marantaceae family. It is a low-maintenance, air-purifying plant native to Central and South America. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Platyaechmea retusa are used to make teas and infusions that can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being.
